dashboards.name: Better Map Widget (Full)
dashboards.description: Provides an enhanced map dashboard with marker clustering, status detail, weather overlays, and resource or group mapping options.
dashboards.attribution: Created by Kevin Ford. Packaged as an installable dashboard by Kerry DeVilbiss.
requirements: LogicMonitor Text widget raw HTML mode
Valid location properties on mapped groups, resources, or services
External map/CDN access from the viewer browser
Optional weather API keys for weather overlays
known_limits: Custom-developed widget; standard LogicMonitor Support may be limited.
Weather and overlay features depend on external API availability.
changes: Packaged latest available widget code into an installable dashboard wrapper for Curated Dashboard Exchange.

security_review.notes: Contains raw HTML/JavaScript Text widget code and can load external map, weather, and CDN resources.

dashboards.name: Dashboard Exchange
dashboards.description: Lets you browse, review, and safely import dashboard packages from inside a LogicMonitor dashboard.
requirements: LogicMonitor Text widget raw HTML mode
Viewer permission to see dashboard groups and dashboards
Browser access to configured catalog and dashboard source URLs
known_limits: Uses the viewer's current LogicMonitor browser session for LogicMonitor API calls.
Imports safe copies under a managed Dashboard Exchange group and does not update existing dashboards.
Import is blocked if an existing Dashboard Exchange group is present without the managed marker.
changes: Packaged as an installable dashboard for Curated Dashboard Exchange.

security_review.notes: Contains raw HTML/JavaScript Text widget code. Uses same-origin LogicMonitor dashboard APIs through the viewer's browser session and loads catalog/source JSON from configured public URLs.

dashboards.name: NOCturne
dashboards.description: Turns active alerts into a generative audio and visual NOC experience.
requirements: LogicMonitor Text widget raw HTML mode
Browser audio enabled by the viewer
known_limits: Live behavior depends on current portal alerts and browser audio permissions.
changes: Packaged as an installable dashboard for Curated Dashboard Exchange.

security_review.notes: Contains raw HTML/JavaScript Text widget code.
